goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'stevenage'.
The train should 'leave after 16:30' and should leave on 'thursday'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
